scripts.test:import: npm run build && node -e "import('@freelanceflow/ui').then((m) => { if (!m.Button || !m.Card) throw new Error('missing ESM exports'); console.log(Object.keys(m).sort().join(',')); })"
scripts.test:require: node -e "const m = require('@freelanceflow/ui'); if (!m.Button || !m.Card) throw new Error('missing CJS exports'); console.log(Object.keys(m).sort().join(','));"
scripts.test:entrypoints: npm run test:import && npm run test:require
